title: wolfTPM version pin in build.rs guards against silent shim breakage
description: wolftpm-sys/build.rs reads LIBWOLFTPM_VERSION_HEX from version.h and panics if it doesn't match the tested value. This is correct because wolftpm_rs_shim.c accesses WOLFTPM2_CTX::cmdBuf, an internal field with no stable ABI. A future contributor might remove this check to 'allow any wolfTPM version'; that would allow silent misbehaviour on version skew. The check must stay.
